codeReview.summary: Reviewed the mission docs, architecture/services guidance, the ts-worker skill, the fix handoff and transcript skeleton, the prior failed review, the original integration-core-flows commit 61b8e52a30310d139c97d51a6266201f1927b005, and the fix commit f23722f4cb121286832af477d8ae0dedf806fda7. The fix directly addresses the reproducibility failure by wiring bot Vitest through a global setup hook (`bot/vitest.config.ts:5`, `bot/src/vitest.global-setup.ts:1`) that rebuilds the missing shared/server/wrapper artifacts in order before the existing integration suite loads `../../server/dist/relay-server.js` and `wrapper/target/debug/codex-relay-wrapper` (`bot/src/integration-core-flows.test.ts:19,32`). The added unit tests cover build ordering and fail-fast behavior (`bot/src/integration-test-setup.test.ts:8,50`), and I did not find any new blocking correctness issues in the reviewed fix.

summary: Pass. The fix resolves the prior blocking reproducibility issue by ensuring the documented `cd bot && npx vitest run` path rebuilds shared, server, and wrapper artifacts before the integration suite runs, so the suite no longer relies on ignored prebuilt outputs.
